title: Implement hidden slide placeholder generation
description: In thumbnails.py, add logic to detect hidden slides via python-pptx (slide.show == False) and replace their JPEG entry with a hatched grey placeholder image of the same dimensions, preserving slide index alignment throughout the list.
acceptance_criteria: Hidden slides are identified by reading the slide.show attribute via python-pptx
A hatched grey PIL Image is generated at the same pixel dimensions as a normal slide thumbnail
The returned image list has the same length as the total slide count
Hidden slide positions in the list contain the placeholder image, not a real render
